narration: Bright ice reflects sunlight; dark water absorbs it. What happens next?
visual_description: Hook visual: Bright ice reflects sunlight; dark water absorbs it. What happens next?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Bright ice reflects sunlight; dark water absorbs it. What happens next?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Bright ice reflects sunlight; dark water absorbs it. What happens next?

narration: This is called the albedo effect. More ice means less absorption, keeping our planet cool.
visual_description: Context visual: This is called the albedo effect. More ice means less absorption, keeping our planet cool.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This is called the albedo effect. More ice means less absorption, keeping our planet cool.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This is called the albedo effect. More ice means less absorption, keeping our planet cool.

narration: But as ice melts, dark oceans emerge, soaking up heat. The cycle begins.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But as ice melts, dark oceans emerge, soaking up heat. The cycle begins.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But as ice melts, dark oceans emerge, soaking up heat. The cycle begins.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But as ice melts, dark oceans emerge, soaking up heat. The cycle begins.

narration: Research shows that this albedo feedback accelerates warming. It’s a tipping point.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Research shows that this albedo feedback accelerates warming. It’s a tipping point.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Research shows that this albedo feedback accelerates warming. It’s a tipping point.

narration: Melting ice isn't just a loss; it fuels a hotter future for all of us.
